videos.title: HTML Div Element Tutorial
videos.description: Quick introduction to the div element and how to use it for grouping content.

videos.title: Divs vs Semantic Elements
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains when to use divs and when to use semantic HTML5 elements.

videos.title: HTML Layouts with Divs and CSS
videos.description: Brad Traversy demonstrates how to create page layouts using divs with flexbox and grid.

videos.title: Complete Guide to the Div Element
videos.description: Comprehensive tutorial covering the div element from basics to advanced layout patterns.
